rationale: Informational usage limit message from bot.
Added content-type check before parsing JSON in fetchApi.
Conditionally setting content-type application/json in fetchApi.
Updated api:types script in package.json to use python instead of poetry run python.
Piped output directly to openapi-typescript in api:types script to avoid untracked openapi.json file.
Corrected dist path in README.md UI Development section.
Made logging suppression conditional on EXPORT_OPENAPI_QUIET in export_openapi.py.
Since package.json was updated to use python directly, this is addressed as python is available in the pytest-unit-tests workflow.
Added settings prefix to workerPauseSnapshot in query keys.
Updated useProfile hook to call /api/me and use UserProfileReadSanitized type.
